title: Better Moss
description: The moss carpet model is redesigned to look more natural and appealing
body:
![BETTER MOSS Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30de4f65707be1f2393c230aea94431029cb93e6.png)

The moss carpet model has been redesigned in this resource pack it now looks much more natural and visually appealing. The moss carpet has been completely reworked to look denser, softer, and more realistic, bringing a fresh natural touch to your builds. Despite its improved detail and richer appearance, it remains fully optimized and won’t affect your game’s performance, keeping everything smooth and stable even on low-end PCs.

![1.4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be6d8b4b0ebfb49b4252916631a3aebcb4344cc7.jpeg)
